controller_claim.note: Do not treat these dimensions as measured. The 2026-07-21 dimension probe shows that configured rows 138 and 139 are not physically present.

measured_layout.evidence: At minimum brightness, the physical top ends with logical row 137 (magenta) above row 136 (cyan); logical rows 138 (orange) and 139 (white) are absent. The first four rows are visible at the opposite edge.
